description: Port keen-pbr (Lua) to C++20 as an always-running daemon with optional REST API, targeting OpenWRT and Keenetic routers. Selective routing for IP addresses, subnets, and domains with interface failover and health checks.

userStories.title: Create Meson build system and Conan dependency files
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the build system foundation so that all subsequent code can compile. Create conanfile.py with dependencies (libcurl, nlohmann_json, libnl, mbedtls, cpp-httplib optional), meson.build with size-optimized flags and feature toggles, and meson_options.txt with build options (with_api, firewall_backend).
acceptanceCriteria: conanfile.py exists with dependencies: libcurl/8.5.0, nlohmann_json/3.11.3, libnl/3.8.0, mbedtls/3.5.0, cpp-httplib/0.14.0 (optional)
conanfile.py uses PkgConfigDeps and MesonToolchain generators
meson.build exists with project name 'keen-pbr3', C++20, size optimization flags (-Os -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections --gc-sections, LTO)
meson.build has 'with_api' feature flag for optional REST API compilation
meson_options.txt defines options: with_api (boolean, default true), firewall_backend (combo: auto/iptables/nftables)
include/keen-pbr3/version.hpp exists with version macros

userStories.title: Create cross-compilation profiles and cross-files
userStories.description: As a developer, I need cross-compilation support for embedded targets (MIPS, ARM, AArch64, x86_64) on OpenWRT and Keenetic.
acceptanceCriteria: conan/profiles/base-embedded exists with shared settings for embedded targets
conan/profiles/ has profiles for: mips-be-openwrt, mips-le-openwrt, arm-openwrt, aarch64-openwrt, x86_64-openwrt, mips-le-keenetic
Each profile includes base-embedded and sets correct arch, compiler, and OS settings
meson/cross/ directory has .ini cross-files for each architecture
Cross-files specify correct toolchain binaries (gcc, g++, ar, strip, pkg-config)

userStories.title: Create Docker build infrastructure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Docker-based builds using OpenWRT SDK images so that cross-compilation requires zero local toolchain setup.
acceptanceCriteria: docker/Dockerfile.openwrt exists, based on OpenWRT SDK image
Dockerfile installs Conan 2.x, Meson, Ninja, and required build tools
docker/build.sh exists and is executable
build.sh accepts architecture argument (e.g., mipsel_24kc)
build.sh runs Conan install, Meson setup, and Meson compile inside container
build.sh outputs binary to dist/<arch>/keen-pbr3

userStories.title: Implement HTTP client wrapper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a libcurl wrapper for downloading IP/domain lists from URLs with HTTPS support via mbedTLS.
acceptanceCriteria: src/http/http_client.hpp declares HttpClient class with download method
src/http/http_client.cpp implements HttpClient using libcurl
Supports HTTPS via mbedTLS backend
download() method accepts URL string, returns response body as string
Supports setting timeout and user-agent
Handles HTTP errors by throwing exceptions with status code info
Typecheck passes (meson.build updated to include this source)

userStories.title: Implement JSON configuration parser - outbounds and daemon sections
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to parse the JSON config file's 'daemon' and 'outbounds' sections using nlohmann_json.
acceptanceCriteria: src/config/config.hpp declares Config struct with DaemonConfig and outbound types (InterfaceOutbound, TableOutbound, BlackholeOutbound)
Uses std::variant<InterfaceOutbound, TableOutbound, BlackholeOutbound> for Outbound type
InterfaceOutbound has: tag, interface, optional gateway, optional ping_target, ping_interval (default 30s), ping_timeout (default 5s)
TableOutbound has: tag, table_id
BlackholeOutbound has: tag
DaemonConfig has: pid_file, list_update_interval (default 24h)
src/config/config.cpp implements JSON deserialization for these types
Throws descriptive exceptions on invalid config
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement JSON configuration parser - lists, route, and DNS sections
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to parse the remaining config sections: lists definitions, route rules, and DNS configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Config struct extended with ListConfig (url, domains, ip_cidrs, file path), RouteConfig, and DnsConfig
ListConfig supports: url (optional), inline domains (optional), inline ip_cidrs (optional), file path (optional)
RouteRule has: list names, action as variant of single outbound tag / failover chain / skip action
RouteConfig has: rules vector, fallback outbound tag
DnsServer has: tag, address (IP/DoH URL/system/rcode://refused), optional detour
DnsConfig has: servers vector, dns rules (list -> server), fallback server tag
ApiConfig has: enabled flag, listen address
Full Config struct has all sections: daemon, api, outbounds, dns, route, lists
JSON deserialization works for complete config format from PLAN.md
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement IP/domain list parser
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to parse text files containing IP addresses, CIDR subnets, and domain names (one per line).
acceptanceCriteria: src/config/list_parser.hpp declares ListParser with parse method
src/config/list_parser.cpp implements parsing of mixed IP/domain lists
Correctly identifies and parses: IPv4 addresses, IPv4 CIDR notation, IPv6 addresses, IPv6 CIDR notation, domain names, wildcard domains (*.example.com)
Skips empty lines and comment lines (starting with #)
Returns a struct with separate vectors for IPs, CIDRs, and domains
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement in-memory IP/subnet set
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an efficient in-memory data structure to check if an IP address matches any stored IP or CIDR subnet.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lists/ipset.hpp declares IpSet class
src/lists/ipset.cpp implements IpSet with add/contains operations
Supports adding individual IPv4/IPv6 addresses
Supports adding IPv4/IPv6 CIDR subnets
contains() method checks if an IP matches any stored address or falls within any stored subnet
Uses efficient lookup (not linear scan for every check)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement list manager for downloading and caching lists
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a list manager that downloads remote lists, reads local files, merges inline entries, caches results, and supports periodic refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lists/list_manager.hpp declares ListManager class
src/lists/list_manager.cpp implements list loading from: URLs (via HttpClient), local files, inline domains/ip_cidrs
Merges all sources for a single list definition into one combined result
Caches downloaded lists to disk for offline startup
Provides a reload() method to re-download and refresh all lists
Returns parsed list data (IPs, CIDRs, domains) per list name
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement routing target type definitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the routing target type definitions that represent how traffic should be routed.
acceptanceCriteria: src/routing/target.hpp defines Outbound variant type matching config types
Defines RoutingDecision struct that resolves a route rule to a concrete outbound
Supports failover chain resolution: given a list of outbound tags, select the first healthy one
Defines SkipAction type for rules that should be ignored
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement netlink route and rule management
userStories.description: As a developer, I need netlink-based route and policy rule management to add/remove routes and ip rules in the Linux kernel.
acceptanceCriteria: src/routing/netlink.hpp declares NetlinkManager class
src/routing/netlink.cpp implements route operations via libnl: add route, delete route, add ip rule, delete ip rule
Supports routing to interface with optional gateway
Supports routing to specific table ID
Supports blackhole routes
Supports adding fwmark-based ip rules
Properly initializes and cleans up netlink sockets
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement abstract route table and policy rule management
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an abstract routing state manager that tracks which routes/rules are installed and can apply/remove them.
acceptanceCriteria: src/routing/route_table.hpp declares RouteTable class for managing installed routes
src/routing/route_table.cpp implements add/remove/clear operations for routes
Tracks currently installed routes to avoid duplicates and enable cleanup
src/routing/policy_rule.hpp declares PolicyRuleManager for ip rule management
src/routing/policy_rule.cpp implements add/remove/clear for policy rules
Both use NetlinkManager for actual kernel operations
Provides cleanup method to remove all installed routes/rules on shutdown
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement health checker with ping-based monitoring
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a health checker that monitors interface availability using ICMP ping.
acceptanceCriteria: src/health/health_checker.hpp declares HealthChecker class
src/health/health_checker.cpp implements ping-based health checking
Sends ICMP echo request to configured ping_target through specified interface
Respects ping_timeout from outbound config
Returns health status (healthy/unhealthy) per interface
Supports checking multiple interfaces
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement circuit breaker for failover stability
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a circuit breaker to prevent rapid failover oscillation between interfaces.
acceptanceCriteria: src/health/circuit_breaker.hpp declares CircuitBreaker class
src/health/circuit_breaker.cpp implements failure tracking per outbound
States: closed (healthy), open (failed, blocking), half-open (testing recovery)
Configurable failure threshold before opening circuit
Configurable cooldown period before attempting recovery (half-open)
Records success/failure and transitions states accordingly
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement abstract firewall interface
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an abstract firewall interface that both iptables and nftables backends will implement.
acceptanceCriteria: src/firewall/firewall.hpp declares abstract Firewall base class/interface
Interface methods: create_ipset, add_to_ipset, delete_ipset, create_mark_rule, delete_mark_rule, apply, cleanup
Supports creating named IP sets for domain/IP groups
Supports marking packets matching an IP set with a firewall mark (fwmark)
Includes factory function to detect and create appropriate backend (iptables vs nftables)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement iptables/ipset firewall backend
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the iptables + ipset firewall backend for Keenetic and legacy OpenWRT systems.
acceptanceCriteria: src/firewall/iptables.hpp declares IptablesFirewall implementing Firewall interface
src/firewall/iptables.cpp implements all Firewall methods using iptables/ipset commands
Creates ipset sets (hash:ip, hash:net) for IP/CIDR entries
Creates iptables mangle rules to mark packets matching ipsets
apply() installs all pending rules atomically where possible
cleanup() removes all created rules and ipsets on shutdown
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement nftables firewall backend stub
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an nftables firewall backend stub for modern OpenWRT systems.
acceptanceCriteria: src/firewall/nftables.hpp declares NftablesFirewall implementing Firewall interface
src/firewall/nftables.cpp implements all Firewall methods using nft commands
Creates nft sets for IP/CIDR entries
Creates nft rules to mark packets matching sets
apply() and cleanup() work correctly
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement DNS server abstraction
userStories.description: As a developer, I need DNS server type abstractions supporting system DNS, DNS-over-HTTPS, and blocking (rcode://refused).
acceptanceCriteria: src/dns/dns_server.hpp declares DnsServerType enum and DnsServerConfig struct
Parses address formats: plain IP, DoH URL (https://...), 'system', 'rcode://refused'
src/dns/dns_server.cpp implements address parsing and validation
Each DNS server has a tag and optional detour (outbound tag for DNS traffic routing)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement DNS rule matching and router
userStories.description: As a developer, I need DNS rule matching to route domain queries to the appropriate DNS server based on configured rules.
acceptanceCriteria: src/dns/dns_router.hpp declares DnsRouter class
src/dns/dns_router.cpp implements rule matching: given a domain, find matching DNS server
Matches against list names from dns.rules config
First match wins (rules processed in config order)
Falls back to dns.fallback server if no rule matches
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement dnsmasq config generation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to generate dnsmasq configuration files that direct domain resolution to specific DNS servers and populate ipsets.
acceptanceCriteria: src/dns/dnsmasq_gen.hpp declares DnsmasqGenerator class
src/dns/dnsmasq_gen.cpp generates dnsmasq ipset directives: ipset=/domain/setname
Generates server directives for domain-specific DNS: server=/domain/dns-ip
Writes generated config to a specified output file
Supports wildcard domains (*.example.com)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement daemon event loop with signal handling
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the main daemon event loop with epoll-based signal handling for SIGUSR1, SIGTERM, and SIGINT.
acceptanceCriteria: src/daemon/daemon.hpp declares Daemon class with run/stop methods
src/daemon/daemon.cpp implements epoll-based event loop
Handles SIGUSR1 to trigger immediate interface re-check
Handles SIGTERM and SIGINT for graceful shutdown
Uses signalfd for signal handling within the event loop
Supports registering additional file descriptors (for API socket)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement periodic task scheduler
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a scheduler for periodic tasks like list updates, integrated with the daemon event loop.
acceptanceCriteria: src/daemon/scheduler.hpp declares Scheduler class
src/daemon/scheduler.cpp implements timerfd-based periodic task scheduling
Supports registering callbacks with configurable intervals
Integrates with daemon's epoll loop via file descriptor
Used for periodic list update (default 24h interval from config)
Supports one-shot and repeating tasks
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement REST API server (optional, compile-time)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an optional REST API server using cpp-httplib, guarded by the with_api compile-time flag.
acceptanceCriteria: src/api/server.hpp declares ApiServer class
src/api/server.cpp implements HTTP server using cpp-httplib
Listens on configured address (default 127.0.0.1:8080)
Integrates with daemon event loop
All API code is wrapped in #ifdef WITH_API / #endif preprocessor guards
meson.build correctly defines WITH_API when with_api option is true
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement REST API endpoint handlers
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API endpoint handlers for status, reload, and health check.
acceptanceCriteria: src/api/handlers.hpp declares handler functions

src/api/handlers.cpp implements: GET /api/status (returns daemon status, loaded lists, active outbounds), POST /api/reload (triggers list re-download and re-apply), GET /api/health (returns health check results for all outbounds)
Responses are JSON formatted using nlohmann_json
All handler code guarded by #ifdef WITH_API
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement main.cpp daemon entry point
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the main entry point that parses CLI arguments, loads config, initializes all subsystems, and runs the daemon.
acceptanceCriteria: src/main.cpp implements main() function
Parses CLI flags: --config (config path), -d (daemonize/background), --no-api (disable API at runtime)
Loads and validates JSON config file
Initializes: ListManager, HealthChecker, CircuitBreaker, Firewall, RouteTable, PolicyRuleManager, DnsRouter, DnsmasqGenerator, Scheduler, optional ApiServer
Downloads and applies lists on startup
Sets up health check schedule and list update schedule
Runs daemon event loop
On shutdown: cleans up routes, firewall rules, ipsets
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a GitHub Actions workflow that builds the project for all target architectures.
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/build.yml exists
Matrix build for architectures: mips-be, mips-le, arm, aarch64, x86_64, mips-le-keenetic
Uses Docker-based builds via docker/build.sh
Uploads built binaries as artifacts
Runs on push to main and pull requests
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update meson.build with all source files and final integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the final meson.build to include all source files, link all dependencies, and produce the keen-pbr3 binary.
acceptanceCriteria: meson.build lists all src/**/*.cpp source files
All dependencies correctly linked: libcurl, nlohmann_json, libnl, mbedtls
cpp-httplib conditionally linked when with_api is true
Static linking configured for embedded targets
Executable target 'keen-pbr3' defined
install target configured
Typecheck passes
